issue_summary: use and detect the EFS flag. Based on submissions made by Wolfgang Glas to commons-compress and TAMURA Kent to Ant.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Retrieve the bytes for the given String in the encoding set for
     * this Stream.
     * @param name the string to get bytes from
     * @return the bytes as a byte array
     * @throws ZipException on error
     *
     * @since 1.3
     */
javadoc_after:
